title: Converting Oracle data types to PostgreSQL
summary: Google Cloud's Database Migration Service uses Gemini to help developers convert Oracle database schemas and code to PostgreSQL. Gemini serves as an AI tutor that converts data types like VARCHAR2, NUMBER, and DATE while explaining the process for developer learning.
